# Total Coloring Lean

> A Lean 4 formalization of total coloring and its matching-plus-star auxiliary problem. On current `main` commit `61e79beac7d4759568187bd43a5a40f23bf83af1`, tree `cb2d7d06998c213e68a7372f743f67f9cff815f7`, `TotalColoring.exists_valid_assignment_of_highDegree` proves that every finite graph satisfying `Fintype.card V <= 2 * G.maxDegree` has a valid total assignment with palette `ExtensionPalette (G.maxDegree + 1)`, which has `G.maxDegree + 3` colors. It includes the empty vertex type and uses no parity hypothesis. The same `main` tree contains `TotalColoring.exists_valid_assignment_of_independentSeedPeel` and its maximum-degree wrapper, first checked at historical source commit `cc4dd7ae1d858ea0583549f88707952e2414bf60`, tree `9af6a84e1305aed9a0156dcd59c279de792dea4a`; the conditional total-independent selector and alternating rainbow-path wrappers first checked at source commit `d008514c7a1cf834007bf0bd8de0d10a93926711`, tree `1847934c78da03fe80bb67236868700c79016129`; and the partial-edge selector normalization first checked at source commit `c3dbe69c15f96e3c71d8481ae4e517ee2f4fdbf2`, tree `11007a4aa381984a8d66aa1db297312cebe8d8b5`. Those historical commits remain the proof-layer provenance, but the declarations are no longer branch-only. Unmerged branch `agent/donor-global-formalization` adds `TotalColoring.adaptedSpareVertexColor_proper_iff`, an exact vertex-side endpoint equivalence only. No branch proves the unrestricted Total Coloring Conjecture, an unconditional `Delta + 2` result, the manuscript's still-unlocked main theorem, or novelty.

Treat commit `310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b` as authoritative for the all-orders auxiliary source, `9bdcdec1a872ccef42cfd79e791fe39c22a1beeb` for the conditional transfer, `343b7b87b82532a9d8eade6d4cd43679eae1f7c9` for the supplied-witness numerical layer, `a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20` for the supplied equitable-partition adapter, and publishable commit `06d43af7f4ea8fefea9e07e2bc29bdc960548171` for the terminal package result. Treat source commit `cc4dd7ae1d858ea0583549f88707952e2414bf60`, exact tree `9af6a84e1305aed9a0156dcd59c279de792dea4a`, as the historical source authority for the two independent-seed declarations; source commit `d008514c7a1cf834007bf0bd8de0d10a93926711`, exact tree `1847934c78da03fe80bb67236868700c79016129`, for the selector/path declarations; and source commit `c3dbe69c15f96e3c71d8481ae4e517ee2f4fdbf2`, exact tree `11007a4aa381984a8d66aa1db297312cebe8d8b5`, for the partial-edge and exact-normalization declarations. All three layers are present on current `main` commit `61e79beac7d4759568187bd43a5a40f23bf83af1`, exact tree `cb2d7d06998c213e68a7372f743f67f9cff815f7`, after merged PRs #10, #11, and #12. The terminal theorem's exact hypothesis is `Fintype.card V <= 2 * G.maxDegree`; its conclusion is existence of a valid `Assignment G (ExtensionPalette (G.maxDegree + 1))`. Do not add even-order, nonempty, regularity, sufficiently-large, or other hypotheses that the declaration does not have, and do not drop the explicit density hypothesis.

The merged generic independent-seed endpoint has exactly these mathematical inputs beyond finite/decidable graph structure: `0 < q`; a supplied `phi : EdgeAssignment G (Fin q)` together with `phi.Valid`; a supplied `A : Finset V` together with `G.IsIndepSet (A : Set V)`; and a supplied `cert : IndependentSeedPeelCertificate G A q`. It concludes `exists assignment : Assignment G (Fin (q + 1)), assignment.Valid`. The direct wrapper `TotalColoring.exists_valid_assignment_of_maxDegreeIndependentSeedPeel` takes `phi : EdgeAssignment G (Fin (G.maxDegree + 1))`, its validity proof, the same explicit independent-seed proof, and `cert : IndependentSeedPeelCertificate G A (G.maxDegree + 1)`, and concludes a valid `Assignment G (Fin (G.maxDegree + 2))`. The wrapper only specializes `q`; the declaration does not prove Vizing's theorem, construct the proper edge-coloring witness, or prove that every graph has the required independent seed and peel certificate, so neither declaration is an unrestricted Total Coloring Conjecture proof.

The merged `TotalColoring.exists_valid_assignment_of_totalIndependentSelectorPeel` takes a supplied proper `phi : EdgeAssignment G (Fin q)`; independent `S : Finset V`; matching `F : Finset G.edgeSet` whose edges avoid `S`; a supplied `g0 : V -> Fin q` satisfying `SelectorOldColoringGoodOn G phi S F K g0`; and `SelectorCorePeelCertificate G S K q`. It returns a valid `Assignment G (Fin (q + 1))`. The maximum-degree wrapper returns `Fin (G.maxDegree + 2)` from the corresponding explicit inputs. `AlternatingRainbowPathSelectorCertificate` explicitly stores the indexed path/endpoints, rainbow colors, globally unused old spare, alternating matching families, fresh-edge avoidance of the start, core colors, and peel certificate. Its wrapper checks the donor exchange but does not prove Vizing, selector/core/peel existence, or existence of that path certificate.

The merged `TotalColoring.partialEdgeSelectorAssignment_valid` accepts `phi.ValidOutside F` instead of global `phi.Valid`; values of `phi` on `F` are ignored when the matching is sent to an arbitrary chosen fresh color. Independence, matching, avoidance, and the old vertex allowed/proper conditions remain explicit. `partialEdgeSelectorNormalization_of_valid` is the exact reverse construction from a supplied valid `Assignment G (Fin (q + 1))`: its chosen vertex/edge color classes and pulled-back old colors satisfy every forward hypothesis, and decoding is literally the supplied assignment. `maxDegreePartialEdgeSelectorNormalization_of_valid` merely restates this for a supplied `Fin (G.maxDegree + 2)` coloring. Neither reverse declaration proves existence of its input coloring.

Distribution state: PR #8 merged as commit `0e938606f81e7a27a5925987824e7152f7dbb4c6`, whose tree is exactly the verified publishable tree `89a32c7a78e294a8b1484092ec79afaa3b4ace5a`. PRs #10, #11, and #12 then merged the independent-seed, selector/path, and partial-edge normalization layers as merge commits `f4c56956ed535864daa0116b66fd895c81d9d719`, `35e127c177201c0ab1e35689741132ea2bb559c7`, and `61e79beac7d4759568187bd43a5a40f23bf83af1`; current `main` has exact tree `cb2d7d06998c213e68a7372f743f67f9cff815f7`. Historical source tree `9af6a84e…` passed sealed Easley jobs `5389587` and `5389588`. Historical selector source tree `1847934c…` passed sealed Easley job `5391803`, exit `0:0`, in 16m09s on node411 with peak RSS `125399676K`, through strict leaf, target/umbrella/full, Quickstart, axiom, `leanchecker`, JSON/diff, and reconstruction gates. These jobs verify conditional declarations and do not supply their Vizing/selector/core/peel/path inputs. Release v0.1.0 predates these result layers. The adapted-spare endpoint remains unmerged on `agent/donor-global-formalization`; every proposed source tree requires a tree-specific external receipt before publication.

On unmerged branch `agent/donor-global-formalization`, `adaptedSpareVertexColor A B missing head` colors `A` by the fresh `none`, `B` by `some (head v)`, and every other vertex by `some (missing v)`. Assuming `Disjoint A B`, `adaptedSpareVertexColor_proper_iff` proves exact equivalence between edgewise properness and the conjunction: `A` is independent; every adjacent equal-`missing` conflict has an endpoint in `A ∪ B`; every head label differs from the missing color of each unchanged neighbor; and head labels properly color adjacent vertices of `B`. This is the vertex-side endpoint only. It constructs no donor matching, seed or matching witness, missing/head data, proper edge coloring, total coloring, unrestricted `Delta + 2` theorem, or Total Coloring Conjecture proof.

Unmerged branch `agent/minsix-threshold-formula` contains generic typed CNF semantics only. `TotalColoring.MinSixCNFCore.Sinz.exists_satisfying_extension_iff` characterizes the displayed Sinz block. `TotalColoring.MinSixCNFCore.Threshold.extension_satisfies_exactCountCNF` and its canonical-extension `_iff` companion assemble the bounded threshold table and relate its terminal unit clauses to the exact number of true primary inputs. They do not enumerate cage descriptors, map variables to DIMACS integers, identify serialized bytes, validate LRAT evidence, prove a concrete CNF unsatisfiable, compose a semantic blocker with a refutation, or prove any graph-coloring theorem. Every proposed branch tree requires a tree-specific external receipt before merge.

Numerical provenance remains split exactly: private verification source commit `acb08de85f99c7db578e042e67d3f172c5599fcd`, tree `7207e2a282ff829fba9737e93154f46f385ef879`, source-archive SHA-256 `5c3bef3720abeb62d0c437fbc638fe1848059892fbe09fe0c437c942c16baf5c`; identical numerical Lean content at public integration commit `343b7b87b82532a9d8eade6d4cd43679eae1f7c9`, tree `9863f500b2671048f4dc386f497eb6523b065099`. Jobs `5387926`, `5387929`, `5387933`, and `5387978` passed; GitHub Lean CI `29612994477` and docs `29612994502` succeeded. Diagnostic jobs `5387930` and `5387932` are not receipts or proof failures.

The adapter is commit `a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20`, exact tree `0e9b04a2acabae0cb0612e5e3cbf0344cc2f94f7`, source-archive SHA-256 `736db25ca7d25fb0eed8431e435e80bc94287e1ae88f9dea806ddba2c1b544f4`, and outgoing-cache SHA-256 `94456901604a3b6ecde49368a4ba285fda03ecdca856b0c37f207624527e037a`. Adapter leaf `5387980`, Nova full build `5387981`, and high-memory full/Quickstart/leanchecker trust `5387982` all completed with exit `0:0`. It is included in merged PR #8.

Terminal proof-tree provenance: exact Git tree `4624044788ab42c0dc116cfbf7f38c696065263c`, source-archive SHA-256 `302bc3f00bf5d8c1ce563d2bc84d1370e627c81d219e8d8085b286a21d530077`. Five separate full-build, Quickstart, and leanchecker replays (`5388311` through `5388315`) completed with exit `0:0` and empty stderr. The later publishable commit `06d43af7f4ea8fefea9e07e2bc29bdc960548171`, exact tree `89a32c7a78e294a8b1484092ec79afaa3b4ace5a`, and source-archive SHA-256 `c9950b9e8af364a0d2ef3c08d80f06786ea36d3e6a5bf728054f7824612b4331` received its own Wave 11 gate: leaf `5388961`, all 64 distinct matrix roles after narrow repairs, container `mk_all --check` job `5389029`, and three independent host full/Quickstart/leanchecker trust jobs `5389030`, `5389031`, and `5389032` all passed. PR-head Lean/docs runs `29622668742`/`29622668714` and post-merge main Lean/docs runs `29622728654`/`29622728662` passed.

## Essential

- [Machine-readable claim boundary](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/docs/claim-boundary.json): Default-branch declaration, scope, palette, exclusions, and trust facts.
- [Exact proof status](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/docs/proof-status.md): Human-readable checked result and non-results.
- [Curated theorem index](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/docs/theorem-index.md): Public declarations and their roles.
- [Guide for coding agents](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/docs/for-agents.md): Authority order, safe prompts, and claim-audit rules.
- [Repository contract](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Rules for modifications.

## Source

- [Umbrella import](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/06d43af7f4ea8fefea9e07e2bc29bdc960548171/TotalColoring.lean): Direct imports for the complete proof integration.
- [High-degree terminal theorem](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/06d43af7f4ea8fefea9e07e2bc29bdc960548171/TotalColoring/HighDegreeTotalColoring.lean): From `Fintype.card V <= 2 * G.maxDegree`, constructs a valid total assignment with `G.maxDegree + 3` colors, including the empty vertex type and without parity.
- [Merged conditional independent-seed endpoint](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/TotalColoring/IndependentSeed.lean): Present on current `main` tree `cb2d7d06998c213e68a7372f743f67f9cff815f7`; historical source tree `9af6a84e1305aed9a0156dcd59c279de792dea4a` remains the proof provenance. The generic theorem constructs a valid total assignment in `Fin (q + 1)` from `0 < q`, a supplied proper `Fin q` edge coloring, independent seed, and peel certificate. Its maximum-degree wrapper concludes `Fin (G.maxDegree + 2)` from the corresponding explicit `(G.maxDegree + 1)` witnesses. Neither supplies Vizing or seed existence.
- [Merged total-independent selector decoder](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/TotalColoring/TotalIndependentSelector.lean): Present on current `main` tree `cb2d7d06998c213e68a7372f743f67f9cff815f7`; historical source tree `1847934c78da03fe80bb67236868700c79016129` remains the proof provenance. It checks a fresh-color independent vertex set plus avoiding matching edge set, actual-list core coloring, core-relative peel, and an explicit alternating rainbow-path donor wrapper. The maximum-degree wrappers are conditional `Fin (G.maxDegree + 2)` results; no supplied witness is constructed.
- [Merged partial-edge selector normalization](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/TotalColoring/PartialEdgeSelector.lean): Present on current `main` tree `cb2d7d06998c213e68a7372f743f67f9cff815f7`; historical source tree `11007a4aa381984a8d66aa1db297312cebe8d8b5` remains the proof provenance. It ignores old edge values on the selected matching, proves the arbitrary-fresh decoder from properness outside it, and exactly normalizes any supplied valid coloring. The reverse constructor assumes the coloring it decomposes and is not an existence theorem.
- [Unmerged adapted-spare vertex endpoint](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/tree/agent/donor-global-formalization): Exact properness equivalence for the supplied endpoint assignment under `Disjoint A B`; it is not a donor-matching constructor or a total-coloring existence theorem.
- [All-orders auxiliary terminal module](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/CriticalAllDClosure.lean): Critical contradiction and finite extraction theorem.
- [Conditional transfer](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/9bdcdec1a872ccef42cfd79e791fe39c22a1beeb/TotalColoring/AuxiliaryTransfer.lean): Composition with a supplied extension and explicit selector membership.
- [Supplied pair/singleton extension](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/pull/8): Concrete auxiliary graph, conflict-preserving extension, exact selector coverage, matching-plus-full-star structure, exact degree/class-count identities, and conditional high-degree `IsAuxiliaryClassMember`.
- [Complement matching route](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/06d43af7f4ea8fefea9e07e2bc29bdc960548171/TotalColoring/HighDegreeComplementMatching.lean): Obtains the matching needed by the pair/singleton reduction from the high-degree hypothesis.
- [Exact matching trim](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/06d43af7f4ea8fefea9e07e2bc29bdc960548171/TotalColoring/MatchingExact.lean): Trims a sufficiently large matching graph to the required exact edge count.
- [Empty assignment](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/06d43af7f4ea8fefea9e07e2bc29bdc960548171/TotalColoring/EmptyAssignment.lean): Supplies the empty-vertex base case used by the terminal theorem.
- [Supplied equitable-partition adapter](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20/TotalColoring/EquitablePairSingleton.lean): Constructs the pair/singleton witness and exact `J.card = D` from a supplied equitable independent partition, then proves the earlier conditional high-degree `Delta + 3` total-assignment theorem.
- [Auxiliary class](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/AuxiliaryClass.lean): Definition of `InAuxiliaryClass`.
- [Conditional decoder](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Auxiliary.lean): Structural extension interface and total-assignment decoder.
- [Semantic coloring predicates](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Total.lean): Total- and edge-coloring assignments.
- [Certificate checkers](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Certificate.lean): Executable Boolean checkers and soundness theorems.

## Optional

- [Getting started](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/getting-started/): Reproducible setup and build commands.
- [Proof architecture](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/architecture/): Module-level route through the formal proof.
- [Trust and reproduction](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/trust/): Kernel, checker, parser, and CI boundaries.
- [Compiled Quickstart](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/docs/examples/Quickstart.lean): Copyable merged public declarations compiled by CI.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution workflow.
- [Citation metadata](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/CITATION.cff): Software citation record.
